title: Security quality gate
description: Policy surfaces, ignore rules, and critical-systems posture before high-risk change.
requiredEvidence: Security policy verifier green or tracked waiver with security reviewer
Critical-systems JSON envelope ok for scope of change
.claudeignore and secret hygiene respected in diffs
strictModeBehavior: Evaluator treats any non-ok JSON status from verify-critical-systems or verify-no-secrets as failure; exit-code-only tools must return zero.
